description: The Basilischi is an organized crime group based in Basilicata, Italy, officially formed in 1994 by Giovanni Luigi Cosentino in Potenza. It operated in several towns and regions of Basilicata, engaging in Mafia-type criminal activities. A maxi-trial from 1999 to 2007 resulted in convictions of key members, leading to the group's fragmentation and increased influence from the 'Ndrangheta.
